title: Design System Architecture
description: Define the structural design using MBSE (Logical/Physical Components, Functional Chains), interfaces (API), and data models (DATA).
ai_instructions: You MUST follow the Architecture Agent Protocol (`architecture_agent_prompt.md`). Implement Arcadia methodology (LA, PA, FC).
execution_steps: Create Functional Chains (FCHAIN) to prove architecture
Ask user to run /handshake to agree on complete Architecture (never handshake by itself)
Ask user for confirmation to complete task
